title: OUTPATIENT SERVICES - 211info
text: KAIROS JACKSON SERVICES OUTPATIENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient services including individual counseling, family therapy, group therapy, skills coaching, family support, peer support, psychiatric and medication management services and case management. 10 Crater Lake Avenue Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Youth ages 0-24 Hours: Varies Email (541) 772-0127 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 772-0127 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Family Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - TREATMENT FOSTER CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
